steps.title: Recognize 10% as a decimal
steps.content: 10% can be written as $\frac{10}{100} = 0.10$. To find 10% of a number, multiply by 0.10, or use the mental math shortcut: shift the decimal point one place to the left.

steps.title: Apply to 520
steps.content: Shifting the decimal point in 520 one place to the left gives 52. That matches Choice B — $52$.
